underlying_goal: Optimize Claude configuration files (CLAUDE.md and rules/memory files) to reduce token usage and cost during sessions
friction_detail: User denied the rm -rf command to delete the redundant old memory tree, which Claude surfaced rather than working around.
brief_summary: User wanted to optimize Claude config files and add cost/token-saving directives; Claude merged duplicate memory trees, trimmed CLAUDE.md by 24%, added new efficiency rules, and committed the work successfully.
